festival Lindy Hop

Calpe Swing Fiesta

25 –27
SEPTEMBER 2026

◈ Calpe, Spain · Europa

Official website
About the festival

Lindy Hop weekend in Calpe with classes, poolside parties, evening dances and live music from Gordon Webster and his band.
